title: Broken Tale
description:
a  simple mod made with MCreator.
It includes some new aromor,weapons,mobs,terrain and so on.
There are also some legendary weapons that have some special effects.
Download it and start your adventure in the mythical world!
body:
# the things that you should know first
**Hello!**
This is a simple RPG Mod made with MCreator,so it is obvious that there are a lot of BUGs in it.
Also, since it is my first mod, it is low-quality.
I am sorry that it only has Chinese version,which means that all the text inside are presented in Chinese.However, I will try my best to add English versions after it becomes more playable.
If you are willing to give it a try, I will appreciate it very much.
**Thanks for supporting!**
## A short introduction of the mod
This mod includes some new aromor, weapons, mobs, terrain and so on.
There are even some legendary weapons that has special effects.
If you want your game to be a bit more difficult, you can turn the gamerule 'defaultrules' on, and your max health will reduce by half.

### Future plans
Just as the name of the mod reads, The Broken World is planned to be the main world that the story happens in. You can get into it through a portal in a ruin which can be found in overworld. However, these contents are still being developed.
